'''âm-t-m-n''' ('''kamatmenoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:baboonize|baboonize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-t-m-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:baboonize|baboonize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âm-t-m-n
|-
! Lemma
| kamatmenoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thimatmenoko|thimatmenoko]] || [[word:jimatmenoko|jimatmenoko]] || [[word:shimatmenoko|shimatmenoko]] || [[word:kimatmenoko|kimatmenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthumatmenoko|thuthumatmenoko]] || [[word:jujumatmenoko|jujumatmenoko]] || [[word:shushumatmenoko|shushumatmenoko]] || [[word:kukumatmenoko|kukumatmenoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thumatmenoko|thumatmenoko]] || [[word:jumatmenoko|jumatmenoko]] || [[word:shumatmenoko|shumatmenoko]] || [[word:kumatmenoko|kumatmenoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thomatmenoko|thomatmenoko]] || [[word:jomatmenoko|jomatmenoko]] || [[word:shomatmenoko|shomatmenoko]] || [[word:komatmenoko|komatmenoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thomatmenoko|thomatmenoko]] || [[word:jomatmenoko|jomatmenoko]] || [[word:shomatmenoko|shomatmenoko]] || [[word:komatmenoko|komatmenoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠmatmenoko|thĂŠmatmenoko]] || [[word:jĂŠmatmenoko|jĂŠmatmenoko]] || [[word:shĂŠmatmenoko|shĂŠmatmenoko]] || [[word:kĂŠmatmenoko|kĂŠmatmenoko]]
|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamatmenoko|thamatmenoko]] || [[word:jamatmenoko|jamatmenoko]] || [[word:shamatmenoko|shamatmenoko]] || [[word:kamatmenoko|kamatmenoko]]
|}
